title: ML Engineer
description: Train and deploy ML models for recommendation systems at scale. You will work closely with data engineers to build feature pipelines and with product teams to define success metrics.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Build scalable APIs for financial data processing and transaction management. Experience with high-throughput systems and database optimization preferred.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze sales trends and build dashboards for business stakeholders. Help drive data-informed decisions across marketing and supply chain teams.

title: AI Research Intern
description: Work on cutting-edge NLP research projects including large language model fine-tuning, evaluation benchmarking, and novel architecture exploration.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage cloud infrastructure, automate deployment pipelines, and ensure high availability of production systems.

title: Data Scientist
description: Build predictive models for patient risk stratification and clinical outcome forecasting. Collaborate with clinicians to validate model outputs.

title: Frontend Engineer
description: Build responsive, accessible web interfaces for a B2B SaaS platform used by 10,000+ businesses. Work in a fast-paced agile team.

title: NLP Engineer
description: Develop NLP pipelines for multilingual text classification, named entity recognition, and information extraction from unstructured documents.

title: Product Analyst
description: Partner with product managers to define KPIs, run A/B experiments, and surface insights that drive feature decisions for a consumer app with 5M+ users.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Build real-time object detection and image segmentation pipelines for industrial quality inspection use cases.

title: MLOps Engineer
description: Design and maintain ML infrastructure including model registries, experiment tracking, automated retraining pipelines, and monitoring dashboards.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build and maintain large-scale data pipelines that process millions of events per day across batch and streaming workloads.

title: Generative AI Engineer
description: Build production LLM applications including RAG pipelines, AI agents, and fine-tuned models for enterprise customers across industries.

title: Quantitative Analyst
description: Develop and backtest quantitative trading strategies using statistical modeling and ML. Work with tick-level market data.

title: AI Product Manager
description: Define the roadmap for AI-powered product features, translate business requirements into ML problem statements, and work with engineering to ship.

title: Reinforcement Learning Researcher
description: Research and implement reinforcement learning algorithms for robotics control and game-playing agents. Publish results at top-tier venues.

title: Cloud Solutions Architect
description: Design cloud architecture for enterprise clients migrating from on-prem to cloud. Define best practices for security, scalability, and cost optimization.

title: Security Engineer
description: Conduct vulnerability assessments, penetration tests, and security audits across web applications and internal infrastructure.

title: iOS Developer
description: Build and ship features for a consumer iOS app with 2M+ downloads. Own the entire feature lifecycle from design review to App Store release.

title: Android Developer
description: Develop Android features for a fintech app serving millions of users. Focus on performance, offline capability, and smooth UX.

title: Knowledge Graph Engineer
description: Build and maintain large-scale knowledge graphs for semantic search and entity resolution in an enterprise data product.

title: Prompt Engineer
description: Design, test, and iterate on prompts for production LLM systems. Build automated evaluation pipelines to measure accuracy, safety, and coherence.

title: Business Intelligence Developer
description: Design BI dashboards and data models that serve executive reporting and operational analytics needs across the organization.

title: Speech AI Engineer
description: Build speech-to-text and text-to-speech systems for regional Indian languages. Work on accent adaptation and noise robustness.

title: Recommendation Systems Engineer
description: Own end-to-end development of personalization algorithms powering product recommendations for 50M+ shoppers.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: Ensure reliability and performance of distributed systems. Define SLOs, build alerting, and run post-mortems to drive continuous improvement.

title: AI Ethics Researcher
description: Study bias, fairness, and transparency in AI systems. Publish findings, contribute to policy recommendations, and audit production models.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Build features across the entire stack for a fast-growing startup. Own small product areas end-to-end, from database schema to UI.

title: Bioinformatics Data Scientist
description: Apply ML and statistical models to genomic datasets for drug discovery and disease biomarker identification.

title: Autonomous Systems Engineer
description: Develop autonomy software for mobile robots including perception, mapping, and path planning modules for warehouse automation.

title: Search Engineer
description: Improve search relevance through query understanding, ranking model development, and index optimization for a platform with 100M+ queries/month.

title: Risk Data Scientist
description: Build credit scoring and fraud detection models. Work with regulators on model explainability and documentation requirements.

title: EdTech ML Engineer
description: Build intelligent tutoring systems that adapt to learner behavior using NLP and ML. Help personalize content delivery for K-12 students.

title: AI Infrastructure Engineer
description: Manage GPU cluster infrastructure for large-scale model training. Optimize distributed training jobs and cut compute costs.

title: Conversational AI Engineer
description: Build and maintain chatbots and voice assistants for enterprise customers. Design dialogue flows, handle edge cases, and improve intent recognition.

title: Spatial Data Scientist
description: Analyze geospatial datasets for urban planning, logistics, and agriculture use cases. Build mapping applications and satellite image analysis pipelines.

title: AI Safety Engineer
description: Red-team LLMs, build safety evaluation benchmarks, and develop mitigations for harmful outputs. Contribute to safety research publications.

title: Supply Chain Data Scientist
description: Build demand forecasting and inventory optimization models for a pan-India logistics network serving 500+ warehouses.

title: Embedded ML Engineer
description: Deploy ML models on edge devices (microcontrollers, Raspberry Pi, NVIDIA Jetson) for real-time inference in IoT applications.

title: HR Analytics Specialist
description: Analyze workforce data to surface attrition risk, hiring funnel metrics, and DEI trends. Present findings to CHRO and business leaders.

title: Marketing Data Scientist
description: Measure campaign ROI, build attribution models, and run experiments to optimize spend across digital marketing channels.

title: Financial Data Engineer
description: Build data infrastructure for real-time financial analytics, regulatory reporting, and wealth management dashboards.

title: LLM Fine-tuning Engineer
description: Fine-tune open-source LLMs on domain-specific datasets using PEFT techniques like LoRA and QLoRA. Build evaluation harnesses and human feedback pipelines.

title: IoT Data Engineer
description: Ingest and process high-frequency sensor data from 100K+ IoT devices. Build real-time anomaly detection and alerting systems.

title: Climate AI Researcher
description: Apply deep learning to climate datasets for weather prediction, carbon footprint estimation, and renewable energy forecasting.

title: Fraud Detection Engineer
description: Build real-time fraud detection systems processing millions of transactions daily. Use graph neural networks to detect money laundering rings.

title: AI Curriculum Designer
description: Design hands-on AI/ML coursework for undergraduate and bootcamp learners. Work with engineers to create coding labs and auto-graders.

title: Drug Discovery Data Scientist
description: Apply ML to molecular property prediction and virtual screening pipelines for early-stage drug discovery.

title: Legal AI Engineer
description: Build AI tools for contract analysis, legal research, and clause extraction. Work with lawyers to validate outputs and define accuracy requirements.

title: Agri-Tech Data Scientist
description: Analyze satellite imagery and IoT sensor data to build crop yield prediction and irrigation recommendation models for smallholder farmers.
